name: The Island House
description: A secluded, family-owned 55-acre private island on the banks of the Stono River, about 20 minutes from downtown Charleston. The whole island is private, giving you a 180º river view, Lowcountry sunsets and a constant island breeze for an entirely outdoor, waterfront wedding. Weddings are the venue's specialty — over 700 couples have married here since 2008. Ceremonies are held waterfront and the reception sits under a permanent 40' x 80' tent; the on-site house is included for the wedding party to get ready.

price.note: Saturday venue rental, seasonal. Peak (Mar–Jun, Sep–Nov — incl. the early-Oct target) Saturday $9,000; Regular (Jul–Aug — incl. the late-Aug target — and Dec–Feb) Saturday $8,000. Fri/Sun run ~$1,000 less; Mon–Thu are $5,500–$6,000. Headline shows the peak Saturday rate. Pulled 2026-06-07 from the site.

availability.notes: Checked 2026-06-07 via the venue's public Google 'Booked events' calendar (an entry = booked; empty = open). All four target Saturdays are already booked: Aug 22, Aug 29, Oct 3 and Oct 10 each show a wedding. Of nearby Saturdays only Aug 1 2026 was open; weekdays in the target months are largely free. The venue books most weekends well in advance.

tent.note: Permanent 40' x 80' tent with a smooth concrete floor

lighting.note: 3 wrought-iron chandeliers, ceiling fans & perimeter lighting under the tent

tables.note: 10× 60" round tables + 5 tall cocktail tables, set to your layout

chairs.note: 125 white resin padded chairs, set up (typically reused ceremony → reception)

dressingSuite.note: The on-site house for the bride/wedding party to get ready

setupCleanup.note: Staff set up the tables & chairs to your layout

spaces.notes: Entirely outdoor — waterfront ceremony on the Stono River, reception under the 40' x 80' tent.

notes: Outdoor waterfront day-of venue near Charleston — fits the 'classy & timeless, outdoor' Option 2 brief, though it's a riverfront marsh setting rather than a manicured garden. The day-rate covers a strong amount of rentals (tent, lighting, 10 tables, 125 chairs, dressing house, setup). Big caveats: every target Saturday is already booked, the Saturday rate is above the $7,000 venue limit (weekdays would fit), and the site doesn't publish its vendor/catering policy — confirm there's no required-vendor list before going further.

attributes.acreage: 55-acre private island on the Stono River
attributes.eventHours: 5 hours for ceremony/reception; vendor access from 10am

flags.label: Saturday rate over $7k limit
flags.detail: The Saturday venue fee is $8,000 (regular, late-Aug) to $9,000 (peak, early-Oct), above the $7,000 venue price limit. Fri/Sun (~$7,000–$8,000) and especially Mon–Thu ($5,500–$6,000) would fit the limit.

flags.label: Vendor policy unconfirmed
flags.detail: The site doesn't state whether outside caterers/photographers are allowed or whether a required-vendor list applies — Duncan's #1 dealbreaker. Left unset rather than guessed; confirm directly before proceeding.

flags.label: Capacity not published
flags.detail: No official max guest count is stated. The 125 included chairs and 40' x 80' tent imply roughly 125 seated, which comfortably covers the 40–60 guest plan; confirm the true cap.
